proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_tamoxifen.
Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_palbociclib.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_trastuzumab.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_olaparib.
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.

PFS by treatment_pembrolizumab: mean=4.630 (n=7585) vs 4.704 (n=42415); diff=-0.074 mo, Welch t-test p=0.0175

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab are more likely to be her2_positive.
Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen are more likely to be er_positive.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib are more likely to carry brca1_mutation.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib are more likely to carry brca2_mutation.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab are more likely to be msi_high.
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan are more likely to be her2_low.
Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib are more likely to be er_positive.

analyses.result_summary: her2_positive prevalence by treatment_trastuzumab: prop=0.188 (group=1) vs 0.179 (group=0); diff=+0.009, chi2 p=0.0412
er_positive prevalence by treatment_tamoxifen: prop=0.701 (group=1) vs 0.696 (group=0); diff=+0.004, chi2 p=0.347
brca1_mutation prevalence by treatment_olaparib: prop=0.024 (group=1) vs 0.026 (group=0); diff=-0.001, chi2 p=0.58
brca2_mutation prevalence by treatment_olaparib: prop=0.024 (group=1) vs 0.024 (group=0); diff=-0.000, chi2 p=0.893
msi_high prevalence by treatment_pembrolizumab: prop=0.011 (group=1) vs 0.010 (group=0); diff=+0.002, chi2 p=0.211
her2_low prevalence by treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan: prop=0.368 (group=1) vs 0.371 (group=0); diff=-0.004, chi2 p=0.622
er_positive prevalence by treatment_palbociclib: prop=0.700 (group=1) vs 0.697 (group=0); diff=+0.003, chi2 p=0.492

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with er_positive tumors have higher mean pfs_months than er-negative patients.
Patients with pr_positive tumors have higher mean pfs_months than pr-negative patients.
Patients with her2_positive tumors have different mean pfs_months than her2-negative patients.
Patients with her2_low tumors have different mean pfs_months than her2-non-low patients.
Patients with brca1_mutation have different mean pfs_months than wild-type.
Patients with brca2_mutation have different mean pfs_months than wild-type.
Patients with pik3ca_mutation have different mean pfs_months than wild-type.
Patients with tp53_mutation have lower mean pfs_months than wild-type.
Postmenopausal patients have different mean pfs_months than premenopausal patients.
Node-positive patients have lower mean pfs_months than node-negative patients.

PFS by node_positive: mean=4.681 (n=25053) vs 4.705 (n=24947); diff=-0.024 mo, Welch t-test p=0.292

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv disease have lower mean pfs_months than non-stage_iv patients.
Patients with has_brain_mets have lower mean pfs_months.
Patients with liver_mets have lower mean pfs_months.
Patients with bone_mets have lower mean pfs_months.
Patients with adrenal_mets have lower mean pfs_months.
Patients with pleural_effusion have lower mean pfs_months.
Patients with pericardial_effusion have lower mean pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher pain_nrs is associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher cough_grade is associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with lower pfs_months (negative slope).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher calcium_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher platelets_k_ul is associated with longer pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The PFS benefit of treatment_trastuzumab is larger in her2_positive patients than in her2-negative patients (positive interaction term).
The PFS benefit of treatment_tamoxifen is larger in er_positive patients than in er-negative patients (positive interaction term).
The PFS benefit of treatment_palbociclib is larger in er_positive (HR+) patients than in er-negative patients (positive interaction term).
The PFS benefit of treatment_olaparib is larger in brca1_mutation carriers than non-carriers (positive interaction term).
The PFS benefit of treatment_olaparib is larger in brca2_mutation carriers than non-carriers (positive interaction term).
The PFS benefit of treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is larger in her2_low patients than in her2-non-low patients (positive interaction term).
The PFS benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab is larger in msi_high patients than in msi-stable patients (positive interaction term).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_trastuzumab x her2_positive: coef=-0.0280 (SE=0.0714), p=0.695, n=50000
Interaction treatment_tamoxifen x er_positive: coef=-0.0582 (SE=0.0528), p=0.27, n=50000
Interaction treatment_palbociclib x er_positive: coef=+1.5944 (SE=0.0491), p=9.31e-229, n=50000
Interaction treatment_olaparib x brca1_mutation: coef=+0.4456 (SE=0.2423), p=0.0659, n=50000
Interaction treatment_olaparib x brca2_mutation: coef=+0.3399 (SE=0.2438), p=0.163, n=50000
Interaction treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan x her2_low: coef=-0.0376 (SE=0.0772), p=0.626, n=50000
Interaction treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high: coef=+0.2171 (SE=0.2975), p=0.466, n=50000

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among her2_positive patients, treatment_trastuzumab increases mean pfs_months.
Among her2-negative patients, treatment_trastuzumab does not increase mean pfs_months.
Among er_positive patients, treatment_tamoxifen increases mean pfs_months.
Among er-negative patients, treatment_tamoxifen does not increase mean pfs_months.
Among er_positive patients, treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months.
Among er-negative patients, treatment_palbociclib does not increase mean pfs_months.
Among brca1_mutation carriers, treatment_olaparib increases mean pfs_months.
Among brca1 wild-type patients, treatment_olaparib does not increase mean pfs_months.
Among brca2_mutation carriers, treatment_olaparib increases mean pfs_months.
Among brca2 wild-type patients, treatment_olaparib does not increase mean pfs_months.
Among her2_low patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan increases mean pfs_months.
Among her2-non-low patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan does not increase mean pfs_months.
Among msi_high patients, treatment_pembrolizumab increases mean pfs_months.
Among msi-stable patients, treatment_pembrolizumab does not strongly increase mean pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The PFS benefit of treatment_olaparib is larger in any-BRCA carriers (brca1_mutation OR brca2_mutation) than non-carriers.
The PFS benefit of treatment_olaparib is similar between brca1_mutation carriers and brca2_mutation carriers (no differential interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction olaparib x brca_any: coef=+0.4022 (SE=0.1740), p=0.0208, n=50000
PFS olaparib effect: brca2 vs brca1 carriers: coef=-0.1030 (SE=0.3379), p=0.76, n=2499

proposed_hypotheses.text: Triple-negative breast cancer patients (tnbc: er_positive=0, pr_positive=0, her2_positive=0) have lower mean pfs_months than non-TNBC patients.
Within triple-negative patients, treatment_pembrolizumab increases mean pfs_months.
Within triple-negative patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan increases mean pfs_months.
TNBC modifies the effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months (positive interaction term tnbc:pembrolizumab).

analyses.result_summary: PFS by TNBC: mean=4.305 (n=10496) vs 4.796 (n=39504); diff=-0.491 mo, Welch t-test p=9.72e-90
PFS by pembrolizumab | TNBC: mean=4.366 (n=1578) vs 4.294 (n=8918); diff=+0.072 mo, Welch t-test p=0.222
PFS by sacituzumab | TNBC: mean=4.228 (n=1084) vs 4.314 (n=9412); diff=-0.085 mo, Welch t-test p=0.217
Interaction pembrolizumab x TNBC: coef=+0.1853 (SE=0.0764), p=0.0152, n=50000

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories.
Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories.
Patients with rural_residence have lower mean pfs_months than urban patients.
More years of education_years is associated with longer pfs_months.
Uninsured patients are less likely to receive treatment_pembrolizumab than privately insured patients.

analyses.result_summary: One-way ANOVA pfs_months by race_ethnicity: F=0.849, p=0.494; group means={'asian': 4.735, 'black': 4.717, 'hispanic': 4.707, 'other': 4.762, 'white': 4.679}

OLS pfs_months ~ education_years: coef=-0.0032 (SE=0.0037), p=0.388, n=50000
Pembrolizumab use: uninsured=0.152 vs private=0.156; diff=-0.003, chi2 p=0.727

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with diabetes_mellitus have lower mean pfs_months.
Patients with hypertension have different mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with chronic_kidney_disease have lower mean pfs_months.
Patients with heart_failure have lower mean pfs_months.
Patients with copd have lower mean pfs_months.
Patients with autoimmune_disease have different mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with prior_malignancy have lower mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with depression_anxiety_diagnosis have lower mean pfs_months than those without.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Larger tumor_size_cm is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher ki67_pct is associated with shorter pfs_months.
More years_since_diagnosis is associated with shorter pfs_months.
More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.
More smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher bmi is associated with different pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one common SNP among the genotyped variants shows a significant main-effect association with pfs_months under simple linear regression (direction will be reported per top SNP).
The strongest SNP main-effect on pfs_months is snp_rs1801131; its coefficient direction in OLS is reported.

analyses.result_summary: Among 24 SNPs, 1 reached p<0.05 under simple linear regression (Bonferroni alpha=0.0021). Top 5 by p-value: snp_rs1801131: coef=-0.0539 p=0.0264; snp_rs2298771: coef=+0.0483 p=0.0822; snp_rs1799983: coef=-0.0366 p=0.118; snp_rs662: coef=-0.0331 p=0.173; snp_rs1045642: coef=-0.0289 p=0.198.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, liver_mets, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, and crp_mg_l, treatment_trastuzumab is independently associated with longer pfs_months (positive coefficient) within her2_positive patients.

After adjusting for ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, liver_mets, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, and crp_mg_l, treatment_olaparib is independently associated with longer pfs_months within brca_any (brca1_mutation OR brca2_mutation) carriers.

After adjusting for ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, liver_mets, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, treatment_palbociclib is independently associated with longer pfs_months within er_positive patients.
Within msi_high patients, after adjustment, treatment_pembrolizumab is independently associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted trastuzumab effect | her2_positive: coef=+0.0125 (SE=0.0094), p=0.183, n=9060
Adjusted olaparib effect | brca_any: coef=+0.0674 (SE=0.0881), p=0.445, n=2499
Adjusted palbociclib effect | er_positive: coef=+1.5728 (SE=0.0158), p=0, n=34886
Adjusted pembrolizumab effect | msi_high: coef=+0.1508 (SE=0.1500), p=0.315, n=498

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a single OLS with all 6 treatments and key biomarkers as main effects plus the matched treatment-biomarker interactions, the treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive interaction term is positive (synergistic benefit).
In the joint model, the treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive interaction term is positive.
In the joint model, the treatment_palbociclib:er_positive interaction term is positive.
In the joint model, the treatment_olaparib:brca_any interaction term is positive.
In the joint model, the treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:her2_low interaction term is positive.
In the joint model, the treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high interaction term is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Combined OLS interaction terms (coef, p): treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive: -0.054, p=0.289; treatment_palbociclib:er_positive: +1.593, p=2.32e-229; treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive: -0.033, p=0.631; treatment_olaparib:brca_any: +0.341, p=0.0411; treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:her2_low: -0.017, p=0.817; treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high: +0.148, p=0.605
Joint-model treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive: coef=-0.0541, p=0.289
Joint-model treatment_palbociclib:er_positive: coef=+1.5928, p=2.32e-229
Joint-model treatment_olaparib:brca_any: coef=+0.3411, p=0.0411
Joint-model treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:her2_low: coef=-0.0172, p=0.817
Joint-model treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high: coef=+0.1475, p=0.605

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with has_brain_mets have substantially shorter pfs_months than those without, even after adjusting for stage_iv.
The PFS benefit of treatment_trastuzumab in her2_positive patients is reduced when has_brain_mets=1 (negative three-way interaction trastuzumab:her2_positive:has_brain_mets).

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted brain_mets effect (controls for stage_iv): coef=-1.0488 (SE=0.0351), p=2.05e-194, n=50000
Three-way interaction treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive:has_brain_mets: coef=-0.3338, p=0.146

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving more concurrent treatments (n_treatments = sum of the six treatment indicator columns) have longer mean pfs_months (positive slope).
After controlling for ecog_ps and stage_iv, n_treatments still positively predicts pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ n_treatments: coef=+0.2603 (SE=0.0117), p=1.83e-109, n=50000
Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ n_treatments + ecog_ps + stage_iv: coef=+0.2663 (SE=0.0106), p=1.19e-139, n=50000

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with prior_chemotherapy have shorter mean pfs_months than chemo-naive patients.
The benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is attenuated in patients who already had prior_immunotherapy (negative interaction term pembrolizumab:prior_immunotherapy).
The PFS benefit of treatment_olaparib in brca_any carriers is attenuated by prior_chemotherapy (negative three-way interaction).

analyses.result_summary: PFS by prior_chemotherapy: mean=4.694 (n=22442) vs 4.692 (n=27558); diff=+0.002 mo, Welch t-test p=0.936
Interaction pembrolizumab x prior_immunotherapy: coef=-0.0283 (SE=0.0878), p=0.747, n=50000
Three-way interaction treatment_olaparib:brca_any:prior_chemotherapy: coef=-0.0897, p=0.797

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among her2_positive patients, the rate of receiving treatment_trastuzumab differs across race_ethnicity categories.
Among brca_any carriers, the rate of receiving treatment_olaparib differs by insurance_type.
Patients with rural_residence are less likely to receive treatment_palbociclib than urban patients.

analyses.result_summary: Trastuzumab receipt by race in her2_positive subset: { asian: 0.197, black: 0.182, hispanic: 0.219, other: 0.217, white: 0.212 }; chi2 p=0.17
Olaparib receipt by insurance in brca_any subset: { medicaid: 0.086, medicare: 0.097, private: 0.101, uninsured: 0.065 }; chi2 p=0.638
Palbociclib receipt by rural_residence: prop=0.348 (group=1) vs 0.349 (group=0); diff=-0.001, chi2 p=0.857

proposed_hypotheses.text: A composite inflam_score = -z(albumin_g_dl) + z(ldh_u_l) + z(crp_mg_l) + z(nlr) is negatively associated with pfs_months.
After adjusting for the inflam_score, treatment_trastuzumab still has a positive interaction with her2_positive on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ inflam_score: coef=-0.0726 (SE=0.0056), p=5.03e-39, n=50000
Adjusted interaction treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive (with inflam_score): coef=-0.0196, p=0.783

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among her2_positive patients, tp53_mutation modifies the trastuzumab effect: the trastuzumab benefit is smaller (negative interaction term tp53_mutation:treatment_trastuzumab) than in tp53 wild-type.
Higher ki67_pct attenuates the palbociclib benefit in er_positive patients (negative interaction palbociclib:ki67_pct).

analyses.result_summary: In her2_positive: treatment_trastuzumab:tp53_mutation: coef=-0.1375, p=0.218
In er_positive: treatment_palbociclib:ki67_pct: coef=-0.0724, p=1.61e-222

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients aged 75+, treatment_palbociclib still increases mean pfs_months among er_positive patients.
In premenopausal er_positive patients, treatment_tamoxifen increases mean pfs_months.
In postmenopausal er_positive patients, treatment_tamoxifen increases mean pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: PFS by palbociclib | er_positive & age>=75: mean=8.542 (n=2039) vs 7.042 (n=3584); diff=+1.500 mo, Welch t-test p=4.1e-105
PFS by tamoxifen | er_positive & premenopausal: mean=4.921 (n=4191) vs 4.877 (n=9614); diff=+0.044 mo, Welch t-test p=0.377
PFS by tamoxifen | er_positive & postmenopausal: mean=4.854 (n=6344) vs 4.845 (n=14737); diff=+0.010 mo, Welch t-test p=0.807

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with liver_mets have shorter mean pfs_months even after adjusting for stage_iv and ecog_ps.
In tnbc patients, the pembrolizumab-treatment benefit is amplified by msi_high (positive three-way interaction tnbc:treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high).
Within msi_high subset, the treatment_pembrolizumab effect remains positive after adjustment for ecog_ps, stage_iv, and tnbc status.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted liver_mets effect on PFS: coef=+0.0259 (SE=0.0282), p=0.358, n=50000
Three-way interaction tnbc:treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high: coef=-0.0386, p=0.957
Adjusted pembrolizumab effect | msi_high (with tnbc): coef=+0.0856 (SE=0.2606), p=0.743, n=498

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a single multivariable OLS that adjusts for ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, liver_mets, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, postmenopausal, and node_positive, the treatment_trastuzumab × her2_positive interaction remains significantly positive.
After full adjustment, the treatment_tamoxifen × er_positive interaction is positive.
After full adjustment, the treatment_palbociclib × er_positive interaction is positive.
After full adjustment, the treatment_olaparib × brca_any interaction is positive.
After full adjustment, the treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan × her2_low interaction is positive.
After full adjustment, the treatment_pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Final adjusted joint model interactions (coef, p): treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive: +0.028, p=0.415; treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive: +0.005, p=0.828; treatment_palbociclib:er_positive: +1.579, p=0; treatment_olaparib:brca_any: +0.035, p=0.673; treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:her2_low: +0.059, p=0.107; treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high: +0.124, p=0.379
Final adjusted joint-model treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive: coef=+0.0055, p=0.828
Final adjusted joint-model treatment_palbociclib:er_positive: coef=+1.5793, p=0
Final adjusted joint-model treatment_olaparib:brca_any: coef=+0.0347, p=0.673
Final adjusted joint-model treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:her2_low: coef=+0.0589, p=0.107
Final adjusted joint-model treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high: coef=+0.1239, p=0.379
